SocketExtensionsHandleSocketT Method (T, FuncIRequest, TaskFuncISocketRequest, ISocketAdapter)

One Identity Manager API Server
Registers a web socket handler for the specified API method.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Socket
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public static IMethodVerb HandleSocket<T>(
	this T method,
	Func<IRequest, Task<Func<ISocketRequest, ISocketAdapter>>> handler
)
where T : IMethod

Parameters

method
Type: T
handler
Type: SystemFuncIRequest, TaskFuncISocketRequest, ISocketAdapter
Generator function for a socket adapter based on the supplied web socket. Called when a client makes a request to this method.

Type Parameters

T

Return Value

Type: IMethodVerb

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type . When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
Remarks
Note that the socket is closed by the server when the session is disposed, or when the server shuts down.
